hits.title: Hazmob FPS: Online Shooter
hits.description:
Hazmob FPS is a multiplayer shooting FPS game where every second counts! Play against other players across multiple game modes in non-stop combat. This first-person shooter game is ideal for those seeking a bit of thrill.

Skilled FPS players will love Hazmob FPS. The game features excellent, clean 3D graphics with a fluid and intuitive control system that allows you to maneuver quickly and tactically. The maps are designed for fast-paced battles in a close-quarters setting, leaving it down to pure reflex and skill to get the job done.

Play various game modes

Team Deathmatch
Search and Destroy
Capture the flag
Domination
Free for all
Elimination
Gun race
hits.howToPlayText:
Controls

WASD = move
Space = jump
Left mouse = shoot
Right mouse / V = aim
P = leaderboard, pause, and settings
G = pick up the gun
C = crouch
Shift = run
1, 2, 3 = switch weapons
4, 5, 6 = skills
E = alternative skills
Q = alternative skills

hits.title: Hidden Objects: Island Secrets
hits.description:
Hidden Objects: Island Secrets is an exciting hidden object game where magic and time intertwine in a thrilling adventure. Everything changed when a mysterious magical crystal activated, scattering objects across time! You'll enter a world of riddles, hidden objects, and temporal paradoxes.

🔍With the help of a faithful guide whose hints will help you navigate the twists and turns of different eras, you'll embark on a journey through the unique locations of a single island, seen across different ages. Search for key items and artifacts scattered among the ancient ruins of the past.

🔍Each location is a vibrant puzzle where you'll need to use your attentiveness and wits to find all the hidden objects on your list.

🔍Enjoy the relaxing atmosphere, soothing music, and beautiful graphics. This game is designed for leisure, allowing you to leisurely immerse yourself in a world of adventure, play a classic hidden object game, and feel like a true explorer.
hits.howToPlayText:
🔍 Find Hidden Objects — Explore locations and discover all the hidden items to uncover the island's secrets.

🔄 Free Movement — Move left and right across the location and use zoom to examine every detail.

📱 Play Anywhere — Enjoy the game on your computer or phone anytime.

💡 Hint Help — If an item is too hard to find, use a hint to continue your adventure.

hits.title: Driver Club: Highway Racing
hits.description:
Driver Club: Highway Racing is a high speed driving game where you dodge traffic, overtake vehicles, and put your reflexes to the test.

Race through a variety of dynamic environments
Unlock and drive a range of powerful cars
Smooth, responsive controls for an immersive experience
Stunning visuals that enhance the thrill of the ride
Push your limits and dominate the highway leaderboard


Core Gameplay & Story

Q: What is the game about? What do you need to do?
A: It's a racing game in the traffic racer genre. You need to overtake other cars to pass the section as quickly as possible. There is also a racing mode where a strong opponent is added to this process.

Q: What is the unique feature of the game? What can hook players?
A: There are not many high-quality and realistic races like this one.

Q: Are there bosses and how are they different?
A: There are faster opponents in the Race mode.

Mechanics & Progression

Q: What currencies are there and what can they be spent on (regular - gold, premium - crystals, etc.)?
A: Money is earned for victories and can be spent on new cars and upgrades for them.

Q: How does leveling up work exactly? What needs to be done to level up faster?
A: You need to win races and upgrade your car.

Economy & Customization

Q: Is there customization in the game? Can you customize the appearance of the hero, location editor, car tuning, etc.?
A: Yes, you can change the color of cars and rims. Change rims.

Retention & Engagement

Q: Is it preferable to play with sound to better immerse yourself in the atmosphere, or will there be difficulties in passing without sound?
A: The sound is done excellently, but it is not necessary for the game.
hits.howToPlayText:
Controls
W / up arrow key = accelerate
S / down arrow key = brake
A / left arrow key = move left
D / right arrow key = move right
C = change camera view
P = pause

hits.title: Car Destruction King
hits.description:
Drive different cars, test your strength with rotating hammers, presses, catapults and other obstacles!
Take part in the races and set new records.
Slow down time for a more realistic crash.
Choose different maps and different game modes!
hits.howToPlayText:
Controls:
TAB - pause menu (or Escape)

Driving - WASD.
Spacebar - handbrake.
Shift - nitro.
C - change camera.
R - reset car.
K - restore car.
N - switch car.
B - slow motion.

For mobile devices, use the game interface.

hits.title: Special Ops: GO
hits.description:
Play instantly in your browser. Jump into fast 5v5 PvP firefights, climb the ranks, and dominate with modern weapons in Special Ops: FPS PvP War.
Full description
Special Ops: FPS PvP War is a modern online FPS built for quick, competitive matches — now playable directly in your browser with no download. Lock in your loadout, enter the arena, and prove yourself in intense real-time PvP battles.
Fight across multiple maps designed for close-quarters chaos and long-range sniper duels. Prefer to play solo? Jump into single-player missions and survive relentless enemies. Whether you’re here for ranked glory or casual fun with friends, every match is about sharp aim, movement, and smart decisions.
Key features

Instant browser play (WebGL): no install, jump straight into action
Online PvP: up to 5v5 real-time battles
Multiple game modes: Deathmatch, Team Deathmatch, Ranked, and Custom Rooms
Single-player mode: missions and survival-style challenges
Big arsenal: 20+ modern weapons including pistols, SMGs, rifles, and sniper rifles
Customization: unlock weapon skins and personalize your style
Progression: daily rewards, quests, ranks, and credits
Sniper-friendly maps: long sightlines + high-stakes duels
Optimized performance: smooth controls and responsive gunplay in the browser
hits.howToPlayText:
WASD = move
Space = jump
Left mouse = shoot
Right mouse  = aim
P = pause, and settings
TAB= leaderboard,
1, 2, 3 = switch weapons
H= Health Kit
